record.field: Restricted internal access to Bitrix tasks explicitly assigned to the employee.
Bitrix task employee: guard task visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (not user.has_group('bitrix_migration.group_bitrix_task_employee') or user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else ['|', '|', '|', ('user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('x_bitrix_auditor_employee_ids.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.create_uid', '=', user.id)]
Bitrix task employee: guard project visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (not user.has_group('bitrix_migration.group_bitrix_task_employee') or user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else ['|', '|', '|', '|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('create_uid', '=', user.id), ('task_ids.user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('task_ids.x_bitrix_auditor_employee_ids.user_id', '=', user.id), ('collaborator_ids.partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id)]
Bitrix task employee: guard collaborator visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (not user.has_group('bitrix_migration.group_bitrix_task_employee') or user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else ['|', ('partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id), '|', '|', '|', '|', ('project_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.create_uid', '=', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.x_bitrix_auditor_employee_ids.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.collaborator_ids.partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id)]
